title: Working capital
summary: 9609 AS — current assets minus current liabilities and liquidity management.
learningObjectives: Suggest ways to improve working capital.

simpleExplanation.title: Cash to keep trading
simpleExplanation.summary: Working capital is the short-term money tied up in stock and receivables minus what is owed short term. Too little risks insolvency.
steps: Working capital = current assets − current liabilities.
Stock, debtors, cash are key assets.
Negative WC may signal cash crisis.

sections.content: **Working capital** (5.1.2) links to **5.3.1 cash flow**. Show **formula and interpretation** in calculations.
